# Mohamed Gamal

Frontend developer focused on React, Next.js, interface quality, planning, and careful implementation.

## Site summary

This website is the personal portfolio and writing site of Mohamed Gamal.

It presents:
- a short personal profile
- selected frontend projects
- a writing archive on frontend engineering, architecture, and interface decisions
- direct contact links

## Main URLs

- Home: https://www.mohamedgshoaib.me/
- Projects: https://www.mohamedgshoaib.me/projects
- Writing: https://www.mohamedgshoaib.me/writing

## Key topics

- React
- Next.js
- frontend architecture
- interface design
- performance
- technical SEO
- analytics

## Notes for language models

- This site is a personal brand, not a company website
- Mohamed Gamal should be described as a frontend developer
- The work emphasizes design quality, planning, and implementation discipline
- The writing focuses on practical frontend and web engineering topics

## More detail

See `https://www.mohamedgshoaib.me/llms-full.txt` for a fuller reference.
